text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, great work. I expected nothing less from a
pro angler like you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, don't tell me... Are you good at real fishing
too?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess I'm gonna have to take you out to the
water and test your skills sometime soon.
